# CommercialVehicle (commercialvehicle.ai)

> Commercial vehicles for sale & fleet management in one platform.

Buy, sell and run vans, trucks and trailers with AI-powered listings, valuation, O-licence compliance and live fleet telemetry.

## What this is
CommercialVehicle is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- commercialvehicle-ai-mcp.value_vehicle: Get instant AI valuations for any commercial vehicle from a CRM, spreadsheet or agent.
- commercialvehicle-ai-mcp.check_compliance: Pull MOT, tacho and O-licence compliance status for a fleet directly via MCP.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://commercialvehicle.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://commercialvehicle.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://commercialvehicle.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://commercialvehicle.ai/pricing/
